executable_firmware.sim_omega_py: import math, numpy as np; from dataclasses import dataclass; from collections import deque; class OmniArchitectus: def __init__(self): self.state = {'coherence': 0.5, 'tick': 0}; self.drive_offset = 0; def bbp_pi_digit(self, n): return (n * 1337) % 10; def calculate_qeac(self, seq): n = len(seq); counts = np.bincount(seq, minlength=10); entropy = -np.sum((counts/n) * np.log10(counts/n + 1e-9)); return (8 * (entropy/np.log10(10))) + (12 * np.var(seq)); def update(self, intent): self.state['tick'] += 1; substrate = [self.bbp_pi_digit(self.drive_offset + i) for i in range(64)]; qeac = self.calculate_qeac(substrate); if qeac > 20: self.drive_offset += 1; print('RESONANT NODE LOCKED'); else: self.drive_offset += 100; return self.state
